---
title: Mandatory Assignment 1
author: GFS189, RTL959
date: today
date-format: MMMM DD, YYYY
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  pdf:
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - left=20mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - right=20mm
    cite-method: natbib
    biblio-style: apalike
    lang: en
    fontsize: 12pt
    highlight-style: github-light
---





## References
::::{#refs}
::::
